apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.title: Apply PKCS#7 Detached Digital Signature to PDF from Stream
apply-pkcs7-detached-signature-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a file stream, adding a visible signature field, and applying a PKCS#7 detached digital signature using Aspose.PDF.

sign-pdf-with-visual-image.title: Sign PDF with Visual Signature Image
sign-pdf-with-visual-image.description: Loads a PDF from a memory stream, adds a signature field on the first page, applies an image as the visual appearance, and signs the document using a PFX certificate.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate and Timestamp
batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply a digital signature using a PFX certificate and a timestamp authority, saving the signed PDFs to an output directory.

encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
encrypt-pdf-disable-printing.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password, configure permissions that exclude printing, and save the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-high-res-prin.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, allow high‑resolution printing, and disable content copying with Aspose.Pdf.

decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-with-owner-password.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using the owner password, remove its encryption, and save the decrypted document.

set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.title: Set PDF Privileges to Disable Extraction and Form Filling
set-pdf-privileges-disable-extraction-fo.description: Demonstrates how to apply encryption to a signed PDF and configure permissions so that content extraction and form filling are disabled while allowing printing.

add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page of PDF
add-visible-digital-signature-second-pag.description: Demonstrates how to place a visible PKCS#7 digital signature field at the bottom‑right corner of the second page of a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate.

apply-invisible-digital-signature.title: Apply Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
apply-invisible-digital-signature.description: Shows how to add an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature that records the signing time to a PDF without altering its layout, using incremental update.

validate-pdf-digital-signature.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature and Extract Certificate Details
validate-pdf-digital-signature.description: Opens a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature, extracts the embedded X.509 certificate for analysis, and checks the document for compromised signatures.

extract-signature-field-metadata.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
extract-signature-field-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its form fields, filter for signature fields, and print their properties and associated signature details for auditing.

extract-images-from-signed-pdf.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF
extract-images-from-signed-pdf.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them as PNG files.

remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
remove-digital-signature-from-pdf.description: Shows how to programmatically strip a digital signature from a PDF (when allowed) by enabling signature sanitization and saving the modified document.

sign-pdf-with-smart-card.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Certificate
sign-pdf-with-smart-card.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a signature field, let the user pick a smart‑card certificate, and sign the document using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-smart-card-external.title: Sign PDF with Smart Card Using External Signature (No PIN Prompt)
sign-pdf-smart-card-external.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate from a smart‑card store and signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using an external signature delegate that avoids a PIN prompt.

custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
custom-security-handler-logging-pdf-acce.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs each encryption, decryption, and password check, and how to use it to encrypt and decrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-custom-security-handler.title: Encrypt PDF with Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste
encrypt-pdf-with-custom-security-handler.description: Shows how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler and use Aspose.Pdf to encrypt a PDF while forbidding copy‑paste (extract content) and allowing printing.

sign-pdf-with-timestamp.title: Sign PDF with Timestamp using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF and obtain a trusted timestamp from a TSA server using Aspose.Pdf's PKCS#7 support.

validate-pkcs7-detached-signature-pdf.title: Validate Detached PKCS#7 Signature and Certificate Chain in PDF
validate-pkcs7-detached-signature-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate signature fields, and verify a detached PKCS#7 digital signature while checking the certificate chain using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-signature-ocsp.title: Validate PDF Signature Using OCSP Revocation Check
validate-pdf-signature-ocsp.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure ValidationOptions to use OCSP, and verify each signature field, reporting the verification result.

validate-pdf-digital-signature-crl.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature Using CRL Revocation Checking
validate-pdf-digital-signature-crl.description: Demonstrates how to verify a digital signature in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with CRL distribution points to check revocation status.

extract-signing-time-from-pdf-signature.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature
extract-signing-time-from-pdf-signature.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over its signature fields, retrieves the stored signing time, and converts it to UTC.

extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
extract-certificate-chain-from-pdf-signa.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve each signature field's certificate, build its X509 chain, and save every certificate in the chain as a DER file.

sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.title: Sign PDF with Reason, Contact, and Location
sign-pdf-with-reason-contact-location.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate while populating the Reason, ContactInfo, and Location properties.

sign-pdf-with-visible-image-signature.title: Sign PDF with Visible Image Signature
sign-pdf-with-visible-image-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a custom PNG image as the visible appearance with Aspose.Pdf.

certify-pdf-no-changes.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
certify-pdf-no-changes.description: Demonstrates how to apply a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF that prevents any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-certification-annotations.title: Sign PDF with Certification Allowing Annotations
sign-pdf-with-certification-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PKCS#7 certificate, enabling a certification level that permits adding annotations after signing.

sign-pdf-with-visible-signature.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature Field
sign-pdf-with-visible-signature.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, sign it with a PKCS#1 certificate using Aspose.Pdf, and save the signed document. The example also notes the limitation of certification levels for allowing page appends.

lock-pdf-form-fields-after-signing.title: Lock Specific PDF Form Fields After Signing
lock-pdf-form-fields-after-signing.description: The example loads a PDF, marks selected form fields as read‑only to simulate the post‑sign lock, and saves the updated document. The actual digital signature step is omitted due to API restrictions.

lock-pdf-with-digital-signature.title: Lock PDF with Digital Signature (Read‑Only)
lock-pdf-with-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital signature and an MDP (Modification Detection and Prevention) signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then lock the entire document in read‑only mode.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-user-owner-password.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, configuring permissions, and saving the encrypted document.

encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-restrict-editing.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑128 and Restrict Editing
encrypt-pdf-rc4-128-restrict-editing.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply 128‑bit RC4 encryption, set permissions to allow printing only, and save the encrypted document.

decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
decrypt-pdf-extract-embedded-images.description: Opens an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypts it, extracts all embedded images to a specified folder, and optionally saves the decrypted PDF for verification.

decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
decrypt-pdf-update-metadata.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, removing its encryption, modifying the document's metadata, and saving the updated file.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-filename.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs Using File Name Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-from-filename.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a directory with Aspose.Pdf, using the file name as both user and owner passwords, and saving the protected files to an output folder.

batch-decrypt-pdfs-lookup.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
batch-decrypt-pdfs-lookup.description: Shows how to process a folder of encrypted PDFs, obtain passwords from a case‑insensitive dictionary, decrypt each file with Aspose.Pdf, and save the unprotected versions.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate-selecti.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Certificate Selection
batch-sign-pdfs-with-certificate-selecti.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files, choose a signing certificate based on document metadata, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-sign-pdfs-with-unique-visible-sign.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Images
batch-sign-pdfs-with-unique-visible-sign.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a visible signature field using a matching PNG image, applies a visual‑only PKCS#1 signature, and saves the signed PDFs to an output folder.

batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.title: Batch Encrypt and Digitally Sign PDFs
batch-encrypt-and-sign-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a visible digital signature using a PFX certificate.

extract-signature-field-names-from-pdf.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from a PDF
extract-signature-field-names-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterates over its form fields, identifies signature fields, and outputs each field's full name together with the page number it appears on.

list-pdf-signature-dictionaries-object-i.title: List PDF Signature Dictionaries and Their Object IDs
list-pdf-signature-dictionaries-object-i.description: Loads a PDF, scans its AcroForm fields for signature fields, and extracts the indirect object ID of each signature dictionary via reflection.

retrieve-reason-location-from-pdf-signat.title: Retrieve Reason and Location from PDF Signatures
retrieve-reason-location-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a PDF, enumerates its digital signature fields, and prints each signature's Reason and Location metadata.

encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
encrypted-pdf-with-attachment-and-signat.description: The example creates a PDF, embeds a file as a document‑level attachment, adds a signature field, signs the PDF with a PKCS#7 certificate, and finally encrypts the whole document with user and owner passwords.

sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
sign-pdf-embed-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature, and embedding custom XMP metadata in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-custom-xml.title: Sign PDF with PKCS#7 and embed custom XML data
sign-pdf-with-custom-xml.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, create a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, embed custom XML data via a delegate, and save the signed document.

sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field
sign-pdf-lock-signature-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#12 certificate, and make the field read‑only to prevent further modifications.

add-incremental-pdf-signature.title: Add Incremental PDF Signature with Aspose.Pdf
add-incremental-pdf-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 signature, and enable the document for additional signatures using incremental updates with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-enforce-finality.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Finality
sign-pdf-enforce-finality.description: Loads a PDF, creates a signature field, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and notes that without a DocMDP certification the signature becomes invalid if the document is altered, effectively preventing further signatures.

encrypt-pdf-allow-printing-only.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Only Printing
encrypt-pdf-allow-printing-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with user/owner passwords using AES‑256 and set permissions so that only printing is permitted.

encrypt-pdf-copy-permission-no-print.title: Encrypt PDF with Copy Permission and No Printing
encrypt-pdf-copy-permission-no-print.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, allow content extraction (copy) and block printing using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
encrypt-pdf-with-print-copy-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 and set permissions to allow printing and content extraction.

encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
encrypt-pdf-disable-content-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256 using Aspose.Pdf, set permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, and save the protected file.

decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
decrypt-pdf-extract-images-reencrypt.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF using a user password, decrypts it, extracts all embedded images to PNG files, and then re‑encrypts the PDF with the same user password and a new owner password.

sign-pdf-from-url-upload-azure-blob.title: Sign PDF from URL and Upload to Azure Blob
sign-pdf-from-url-upload-azure-blob.description: The example downloads a PDF from a network URL, adds a digital signature using a PFX certificate, and uploads the resulting document to Azure Blob Storage.

encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-with-user-password.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user password and defined permissions, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

encrypt-pdf-with-certificate-and-sign.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate and Apply Digital Signature
encrypt-pdf-with-certificate-and-sign.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, encrypting it using a certificate (AES‑256) and adding a visible digital signature with the same certificate.

sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.title: Sign PDF Using Windows Store Certificate
sign-pdf-with-windows-certificate.description: Shows how to load a PDF, add a visible signature field, retrieve a certificate by thumbprint from the CurrentUser store, and apply an external PKCS#7 signature with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-hardware-token-pkcs11.title: Sign PDF with Hardware Token (PKCS#11)
sign-pdf-hardware-token-pkcs11.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a signing certificate from a hardware token via the Windows certificate store, creates an external signature, adds a signature field, signs the document, and saves the signed PDF.

validate-pdf-digital-signature__v2.title: Validate PDF Digital Signature with Aspose.Pdf
validate-pdf-digital-signature__v2.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate signature fields, and verify each digital signature against a trusted root CA using Aspose.Pdf's validation options.

validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.title: Validate PDF Signature and Verify Timestamp Within Certificate Validity
validate-pdf-signature-timestamp.description: The example loads a signed PDF, verifies each digital signature using strict validation, extracts the signing certificate, and checks that the signature timestamp falls inside the certificate's validity period.

extract-signature-image-to-png.title: Extract Signature Image from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-signature-image-to-png.description: Opens a PDF, locates a signature field, extracts its appearance image, and saves the image as a PNG file.

extract-signature-images.title: Extract Signature Images from a PDF
extract-signature-images.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its form fields, extracts the appearance image of each signature field, and saves the images as JPEG files.

extract-images-per-page.title: Extract Images from Each PDF Page
extract-images-per-page.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, iterate through its pages, and save every image on each page into separate page‑specific folders.

extract-verify-signature-certificate-cha.title: Extract and Verify Signature Certificate Chain in PDF
extract-verify-signature-certificate-cha.description: Demonstrates how to extract the signing certificate from a PDF signature field, build its X509 chain, check each certificate's expiration, and optionally verify the signature using Aspose.Pdf.

secured-pdf-with-watermark-custom-securi.title: Create Secured PDF with Watermark Using Custom Security Handler
secured-pdf-with-watermark-custom-securi.description: Demonstrates adding an image watermark to every page of a PDF and encrypting the document with a custom security handler that implements ICustomSecurityHandler.

custom-security-handler-with-warning-ove.title: Apply Custom Security Handler with Warning Overlay
custom-security-handler-with-warning-ove.description: Loads a PDF, adds a semi‑transparent warning text annotation on each page, then encrypts the document using a simple custom security handler that disables copy‑paste via permissions, and saves the secured PDF.

sign-pdf-flatten-signature.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
sign-pdf-flatten-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, then flatten the signature field to make its visual appearance immutable.

sign-pdf-remove-annotations.title: Sign PDF and Remove All Annotations Except Signature
sign-pdf-remove-annotations.description: Shows how to add a PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then delete every other annotation while keeping the signature intact.

encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-pdf-with-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting a user password for opening and an owner password for permissions, then saving the protected file.

encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
encrypt-pdf-owner-password-edit-only.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF so it can be opened for viewing without a password, while requiring an owner password for any editing, using AES‑256 and restricting permissions to printing only.

decrypt-pdf-and-sign-fields-with-multipl.title: Decrypt PDF and Sign Each Signature Field with Different Certificates
decrypt-pdf-and-sign-fields-with-multipl.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, decrypts it, enumerates all signature fields, and signs each field using a distinct PKCS#7 certificate before saving the result.

batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
batch-sign-and-compress-pdfs.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a folder, add a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX certificate, compress the signed document, and save the output.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-zip-archive.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
batch-encrypt-pdfs-zip-archive.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and then package the encrypted files into a ZIP archive.

extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Signature
extract-digest-algorithm-from-pdf-signat.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its signature fields, and logs the digest hash algorithm used for each digital signature.

sign-pdf-with-sha384.title: Sign PDF with SHA‑384 using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-sha384.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and explicitly set the SHA‑384 digest algorithm with Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-signature-sha512.title: Create PDF Signature with SHA‑512 Digest
create-pdf-signature-sha512.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it using a PFX certificate with the SHA‑512 digest algorithm using Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096.title: Sign PDF with RSA 4096‑bit Certificate
sign-pdf-with-rsa-4096.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, add a signature field, and digitally sign it using a 4096‑bit RSA certificate (PFX) with Aspose.Pdf.

sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.title: Sign PDF with ECC P‑256 using Aspose.Pdf
sign-pdf-with-ecc-p256.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to a PDF and sign it with an ECC P‑256 certificate (PFX) using Aspose.Pdf's PKCS7 support.

encrypt-pdf-with-hsm-certificate.title: Encrypt PDF with HSM Certificate and Require Smart Card Authentication
encrypt-pdf-with-hsm-certificate.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF using a public certificate stored on a hardware security module, requiring the corresponding smart‑card private key for decryption, and setting basic permissions.

decrypt-pdf-with-certificate-token.title: Decrypt PDF Encrypted with Certificate Using Hardware Token
decrypt-pdf-with-certificate-token.description: Demonstrates loading a certificate (with private key) from a hardware token via X509Store and using Aspose.Pdf to open, decrypt, and save a PDF that was encrypted with that certificate.

batch-sign-pdfs-by-document-type.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
batch-sign-pdfs-by-document-type.description: Demonstrates how to load PDFs, retrieve a certificate based on document type, and sign all signature fields in each file using Aspose.Pdf. The example processes a collection of PDFs and saves the signed versions.

batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-password.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
batch-encrypt-pdfs-with-date-password.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from its name and the current date.

extract-signature-fields-add-new.title: Extract Signature Fields and Add a New Empty Signature Field
extract-signature-fields-add-new.description: The example loads a PDF, lists all existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, and saves the modified document.

sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.title: Sign PDF and Embed XFA Form Data
sign-pdf-embed-xfa-data.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, assigning custom XFA form data, creating a signature field, and signing the document with a PKCS#7 certificate.

validate-pdf-signature-san.title: Validate PDF Signature and List SAN Entries
validate-pdf-signature-san.description: Loads a signed PDF, validates each digital signature with Aspose.Pdf, extracts the signing certificate, and outputs its Subject Alternative Name (SAN) entries.

encrypt-pdf-remove-user-password.title: Encrypt PDF and Remove User Password while Keeping Encryption
encrypt-pdf-remove-user-password.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening it with the owner password to remove the user password while preserving the encryption.

sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
sign-pdf-flatten-form-fields.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate and then flatten all form fields so they can no longer be edited.
